d3e1_a.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_a.text: Day 3! Your team is growing. One of your staff members comes to you this morning looking stressed. Something is clearly wrong.

d3e1_b.speaker: Staff
d3e1_b.text: Boss, I have been feeling really overwhelmed lately. The workload is too much and I am making mistakes. I do not know how much longer I can keep this up.

choices.text: Listen carefully and adjust their workload
Tell them to push through it gets better
Offer a small bonus for their hard work
Suggest they take a day off to recover

d3e1_c_listen.speaker: Staff
d3e1_c_listen.text: Thank you for hearing me out. Just knowing you care makes such a difference. I feel better already.

d3e1_c_push.speaker: Staff
d3e1_c_push.text: I... okay. I will try. Sorry for bringing it up.

d3e1_c_bonus.speaker: Staff
d3e1_c_bonus.text: Oh wow, thank you! That really means a lot. I will keep giving my best!

d3e1_c_dayoff.speaker: Staff
d3e1_c_dayoff.text: Really? A day off? Thank you so much. I promise I will come back recharged and ready!

d3e1_result_listen.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_result_listen.text: Active listening is a superpower in leadership. Adjusting workload prevents burnout and keeps your best people around.

d3e1_result_push.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_result_push.text: Dismissing staff concerns breeds resentment. Burned out employees make more mistakes and eventually quit.

d3e1_result_bonus.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_result_bonus.text: Financial recognition motivates but does not solve the root problem. Pair rewards with workload reviews for best results.

d3e1_result_dayoff.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_result_dayoff.text: Rest is productive! A recovered employee outperforms an exhausted one every time. Smart investment.

d3e1_a_loyal.speaker: Regular Customer
d3e1_a_loyal.text: You gave me a discount on Day 1 and I told everyone! I brought five friends today. This place is everything I said it was.

d3e1_loyal_b.speaker: You
d3e1_loyal_b.text: The loyalty discount I gave on Day 1 just brought in five new customers at once. Word of mouth is real.

choices.text: Offer the whole group a welcome discount too
Welcome them warmly no extra discount needed
Thank the regular and serve everyone normally

d3e1_loyal_c_extend.speaker: New Customers
d3e1_loyal_c_extend.text: A welcome discount AND great service? We are absolutely coming back. This place is special.

d3e1_loyal_c_welcome.speaker: New Customers
d3e1_loyal_c_welcome.text: The warmth here is exactly what we heard about. No wonder our friend raves about this place.

d3e1_loyal_c_normal.speaker: Regular Customer
d3e1_loyal_c_normal.text: See? I told you all. Same great service every single time. Consistency is everything.

d3e1_loyal_result_extend.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_loyal_result_extend.text: Your Day 1 generosity just multiplied. One small discount became five new customers and a compounding reputation boost. This is how loyalty programs work.

d3e1_loyal_result_welcome.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_loyal_result_welcome.text: Warmth without financial cost is powerful. Your Day 1 investment in loyalty is paying dividends without further expense.

d3e1_loyal_result_normal.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_loyal_result_normal.text: Consistency is its own reward. Your Day 1 decision built trust and that trust is now walking through your door in groups.

d3e2_a.speaker: Mentor
d3e2_a.text: Midday. A loyal customer left a negative review online saying your prices are too high. It is gaining traction. How do you respond?

d3e2_b.speaker: You
d3e2_b.text: A negative review going viral is the last thing I need right now...

choices.text: Respond publicly with a calm professional reply
Message them privately and offer a discount
Ignore it and hope it dies down
Ask happy customers to leave positive reviews

d3e2_c_respond.speaker: Customer
d3e2_c_respond.text: I appreciate the thoughtful response. It shows you actually care about feedback. Respect.

d3e2_c_private.speaker: Customer
d3e2_c_private.text: Oh! A personal message and a discount? I did not expect that. Maybe I was too harsh in my review.

d3e2_c_ignore.speaker: Passerby
d3e2_c_ignore.text: I saw that review and they never even responded. Does not say much about how they treat customers.

d3e2_c_positive.speaker: Happy Customer
d3e2_c_positive.text: Of course! You have been nothing but wonderful to us. Happy to share my experience!

d3e2_result_respond.speaker: Mentor
d3e2_result_respond.text: Public professional responses to negative reviews show maturity. Other potential customers see how you handle criticism.

d3e2_result_private.speaker: Mentor
d3e2_result_private.text: Personal outreach shows genuine care. Turning a critic into a fan is one of the best outcomes possible.

d3e2_result_ignore.speaker: Mentor
d3e2_result_ignore.text: Silence reads as indifference online. Unaddressed negative reviews compound over time and damage trust.

d3e2_result_positive.speaker: Mentor
d3e2_result_positive.text: Smart reputation management! Amplifying positive voices is just as important as addressing negative ones.

d3e3_a.speaker: Mentor
d3e3_a.text: End of day 3. You have a chance to invest in a small marketing campaign. It will cost money but could bring in new customers. What do you decide?

d3e3_b.speaker: You
d3e3_b.text: Marketing could really help us grow but I need to think about where to put the budget...

choices.text: Invest in social media ads
Print flyers and distribute in the neighborhood
Host a small in store event
Skip marketing and save the money

d3e3_c_social.speaker: New Customer
d3e3_c_social.text: I found you on social media! Your ads looked so good I had to come check it out in person.

d3e3_c_flyers.speaker: Neighbor
d3e3_c_flyers.text: I got your flyer this morning! Great timing, I was just looking for a place like this nearby.

d3e3_c_event.speaker: Event Attendee
d3e3_c_event.text: This event is amazing! I brought three friends along and we all love what you have here!

d3e3_c_skip.speaker: Staff
d3e3_c_skip.text: It has been pretty quiet today boss. Not many new faces coming in lately.

d3e3_result_social.speaker: Mentor
d3e3_result_social.text: Digital marketing has incredible reach. A well targeted ad can bring customers from far beyond your neighborhood.

d3e3_result_flyers.speaker: Mentor
d3e3_result_flyers.text: Never underestimate local marketing! Community presence builds trust that online ads cannot always replicate.

d3e3_result_event.speaker: Mentor
d3e3_result_event.text: Experiential marketing is powerful! Events create memories and word of mouth that money cannot buy directly.

d3e3_result_skip.speaker: Mentor
d3e3_result_skip.text: Saving is wise but growth requires investment. Without visibility new customers cannot find you no matter how good you are.

d3e3_a_stocked.speaker: Mentor
d3e3_a_stocked.text: Remember that bulk order you made on Day 1? It is paying off today. Your fully stocked shelves handled the Day 3 rush perfectly.

d3e3_stocked_b.speaker: You
d3e3_stocked_b.text: The bulk stock from Day 1 meant we never ran out today. Now I have leftover stock and a decision to make.

choices.text: Run a promotion using the extra stock
Save it for tomorrow stay conservative
Donate excess to a local charity

d3e3_stocked_c_promo.speaker: Customer
d3e3_stocked_c_promo.text: A promotion this late in the day? Perfect timing! I was just about to leave but this kept me here.

d3e3_stocked_c_save.speaker: Staff
d3e3_stocked_c_save.text: Smart call. Having buffer stock tomorrow means we start the day confident instead of anxious.

d3e3_stocked_c_donate.speaker: Community Member
d3e3_stocked_c_donate.text: You donated your extra stock? That is incredible. This shop truly cares about the community. I am telling everyone.

d3e3_stocked_result_promo.speaker: Mentor
d3e3_stocked_result_promo.text: Your Day 1 bulk order created an opportunity you could not have had otherwise. Forward thinking decisions compound over time.

d3e3_stocked_result_save.speaker: Mentor
d3e3_stocked_result_save.text: Buffer stock is a strategic asset. Your Day 1 investment in inventory is now your operational safety net.

d3e3_stocked_result_donate.speaker: Mentor
d3e3_stocked_result_donate.text: Community generosity creates the kind of reputation that no marketing budget can buy. Your Day 1 bulk order just became a community relations win.

d3r_review_event.speaker: Mentor
d3r_review_event.text: A major review site just reached out wanting to feature local businesses. This is unexpected but could be huge.

d3r_review_b.speaker: Reviewer
d3r_review_b.text: We are featuring top local businesses this month. Your shop kept coming up in our research. Would you be open to a feature?

choices.text: Absolutely say yes immediately
Ask what the feature involves first
Decline politely not ready yet

d3r_review_c_yes.speaker: Reviewer
d3r_review_c_yes.text: Wonderful! We will send a photographer tomorrow. This feature reaches 200,000 readers monthly.

d3r_review_c_ask.speaker: Reviewer
d3r_review_c_ask.text: Smart to ask! It is a full page feature with photos and an interview. Very positive coverage guaranteed.

d3r_review_c_decline.speaker: Reviewer
d3r_review_c_decline.text: Of course no pressure. We will check back next quarter when you feel more ready.

d3r_review_result_yes.speaker: Mentor
d3r_review_result_yes.text: Seizing media opportunities when they come is bold and smart. Your Day 3 reputation just got a massive amplifier.

d3r_review_result_ask.speaker: Mentor
d3r_review_result_ask.text: Due diligence before committing is always wise. You got the full picture and made an informed yes. That is the right process.

d3r_review_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d3r_review_result_decline.text: Knowing your limits is valid but readiness is sometimes a mindset not a state. Make sure you are not letting fear pose as preparation.

d3r_staff_birthday.speaker: Staff
d3r_staff_birthday.text: Boss! Today is one of our team member's birthday. The whole team is hoping we can do something small to celebrate during break.

choices.text: Organize a surprise during break on you
Give them the afternoon off as a gift
Wish them happy birthday and continue working

d3r_birthday_c_surprise.speaker: Birthday Staff
d3r_birthday_c_surprise.text: I had no idea! This is the best surprise. I love this team and this place so much. Thank you boss!

d3r_birthday_c_off.speaker: Birthday Staff
d3r_birthday_c_off.text: An afternoon off on my birthday?! That is genuinely the best gift. You always think of us as people first.

d3r_birthday_c_basic.speaker: Birthday Staff
d3r_birthday_c_basic.text: Thank you boss. Appreciate it. Back to work then.

d3r_birthday_result_surprise.speaker: Mentor
d3r_birthday_result_surprise.text: Celebrating your team as people not just workers creates belonging. That sense of family is what makes great teams stay together through hard times.

d3r_birthday_result_off.speaker: Mentor
d3r_birthday_result_off.text: Time is the most valuable gift you can give. Giving someone their time back signals you value them as a person above their productivity.

d3r_birthday_result_basic.speaker: Mentor
d3r_birthday_result_basic.text: A simple acknowledgment is better than nothing. But small gestures on significant personal days have outsized impact on loyalty and belonging.

d3r_supplier_bonus.speaker: Supplier
d3r_supplier_bonus.text: You have been a reliable client. As a thank you we want to offer you a bonus shipment of premium stock at no extra charge. Just say the word.

choices.text: Accept gratefully
Accept and ask what prompted this
Decline to maintain independence

d3r_supplier_c_accept.speaker: Supplier
d3r_supplier_c_accept.text: It is on its way! Reliable partners deserve recognition. We hope this helps you serve your customers even better.

d3r_supplier_c_ask.speaker: Supplier
d3r_supplier_c_ask.text: Honestly? You always pay on time and treat our delivery staff with respect. That matters more than you know in this industry.

d3r_supplier_c_decline.speaker: Supplier
d3r_supplier_c_decline.text: I respect that. The offer stands if you ever change your mind. Just know we genuinely value this partnership.

d3r_supplier_result_accept.speaker: Mentor
d3r_supplier_result_accept.text: Reliability pays dividends you cannot predict. Your consistent professionalism created this reward — it was not luck it was character.

d3r_supplier_result_ask.speaker: Mentor
d3r_supplier_result_ask.text: Understanding why good things happen is as important as appreciating them. How you treat everyone in your supply chain defines your reputation across the industry.

d3r_supplier_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d3r_supplier_result_decline.text: Maintaining independence is a valid philosophy. Just make sure it is not pride preventing you from accepting genuine goodwill when offered.
